hero.title: Training & Education
hero.subtitle: Industry-standard and bespoke training for your workforce.
hero.description: Kirk & Kirk provides industry-standard training packages and designs bespoke training courses to meet the specific needs of your company. From IOSH and NEBOSH accredited programmes to tailored in-house sessions, we equip your people with the knowledge and competence they need.

overview.heading: Competence That Counts
overview.description: Training isn't a box-ticking exercise — it's the foundation of a competent, confident workforce. Our courses are designed to deliver practical knowledge that people actually retain and apply, whether you need nationally accredited qualifications or bespoke sessions built around your specific operations and hazards.

features.title: Accredited Programmes
features.description: IOSH Managing Safely, IOSH Working Safely, NEBOSH General Certificate, and other nationally recognised qualifications delivered by experienced trainers.

features.title: Bespoke Training
features.description: Custom-designed courses tailored to your industry, workplace hazards, and operational procedures — delivered on-site or remotely to suit your schedule.

features.title: Toolbox Talks & Briefings
features.description: Short, focused safety briefings and toolbox talks designed for frontline teams, covering specific hazards, procedures, and seasonal risks.

steps.title: Training Needs Analysis
steps.description: Assessing your workforce competence requirements against regulatory obligations, risk profiles, and operational needs to identify priority training areas.

steps.title: Course Design & Delivery
steps.description: Developing and delivering training programmes that combine regulatory knowledge with practical, workplace-relevant application.

steps.title: Assessment & Follow-Up
steps.description: Evaluating learning outcomes, issuing certifications where applicable, and providing refresher schedules to maintain ongoing competence.

cta.heading: Upskill Your Team
cta.description: Invest in your people's competence and confidence. Whether you need accredited qualifications or bespoke in-house training, we'll design a programme that works for your business.
